requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Evidence for Ireland PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——爱尔兰光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——愛爾蘭光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000證據

summary.en: Ireland PV inverter EMC expectations should be prepared on an EU CE and IEC basis because NSAI is the national standards body, EMC Directive 2014/30/EU applies, and project specifications for grid-connected PV commonly reference IEC-family inverter evidence. The practical EMC package should include IEC 62920 for PV power conversion equipment and applicable IEC 61000-series evidence for emissions, immunity, harmonics, surge, voltage dips, and power quality. For ESB Networks grid-connected projects, harmonic and conducted-emission evidence should be tied to the actual inverter model, rating, and configuration. Because Ireland uses a 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid, EMC and harmonic results obtained only under China 220/380 V conditions should be reviewed for applicability before submission.
summary.zh: 爱尔兰光伏逆变器EMC要求应按欧盟CE和IEC体系准备，因为NSAI是国家标准机构、适用电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU，并网光伏项目规格通常引用IEC系列逆变器证据。实际EMC包应包括面向光伏功率变换设备的IEC 62920，以及适用的IEC 61000系列发射、抗扰度、谐波、浪涌、电压暂降和电能质量证据。对于ESB Networks并网项目，谐波和传导发射证据应对应实际逆变器型号、功率等级和配置。由于爱尔兰电网为230/400 V、50 Hz，仅在中国220/380 V条件下取得的EMC和谐波结果，在提交前应审查其适用性。
summary.zht: 愛爾蘭光伏逆變器EMC要求應按歐盟CE和IEC體系準備，因為NSAI是國家標準機構、適用電磁相容指令2014/30/EU，併網光伏項目規格通常引用IEC系列逆變器證據。實際EMC包應包括面向光伏功率轉換設備的IEC 62920，以及適用的IEC 61000系列發射、抗擾度、諧波、浪湧、電壓暫降和電能品質證據。對於ESB Networks併網項目，諧波和傳導發射證據應對應實際逆變器型號、功率等級和配置。由於愛爾蘭電網為230/400 V、50 Hz，僅在中國220/380 V條件下取得的EMC和諧波結果，在提交前應審查其適用性。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test, immunity, harmonic, surge, voltage-dip, and power-quality standards as applicable to the inverter configuration
NSAI standards adoption and project specification requirements where applicable
ESB Networks grid-connection review requirements for power quality and harmonic performance

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021 and related domestic EMC test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories. These reports can be useful engineering background but are not automatically equivalent to IEC 62920 or the IEC 61000-series evidence requested by an Ireland project owner, EU CE conformity route, CRU review, or ESB Networks grid-connection process. China test conditions are normally aligned with the China 220/380 V, 50 Hz baseline, while Ireland uses 230/400 V at the same frequency.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常依赖GB/T 37408-2021及来自CNAS认可实验室的相关国内EMC测试报告。这些报告可作为工程背景，但不能自动等同于爱尔兰项目业主、欧盟CE合格评定路径、CRU审查或ESB Networks并网流程要求的IEC 62920或IEC 61000系列证据。中国测试条件通常对应中国220/380 V、50 Hz基准，而爱尔兰在相同频率下使用230/400 V。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常依賴GB/T 37408-2021及來自CNAS認可實驗室的相關國內EMC測試報告。這些報告可作為工程背景，但不能自動等同於愛爾蘭項目業主、歐盟CE合格評定路徑、CRU審查或ESB Networks併網流程要求的IEC 62920或IEC 61000系列證據。中國測試條件通常對應中國220/380 V、50 Hz基準，而愛爾蘭在相同頻率下使用230/400 V。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CNAS-accredited domestic EMC test reports under China standard scopes

gap.en: Gap: China-only EMC certificates under GB/T 37408 do not automatically satisfy Ireland EU CE / IEC-based project expectations. Exporters should obtain IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports for the specific model or family, confirm whether harmonics and conducted-emission results remain valid at 230/400 V, and provide surge, earthing, shielding, and enclosure documentation suitable for the humid, maritime Irish climate. Where ESB Networks or the project owner specifies harmonic limits or power-quality measurements, test reports should be mapped clause-by-clause to that requirement.
gap.zh: 差距：仅依据GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不能自动满足爱尔兰欧盟CE / IEC体系项目要求。出口商应取得针对特定型号或系列的IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列报告，确认谐波和传导发射结果在230/400 V下是否仍有效，并提供适合潮湿海洋性爱尔兰气候的浪涌、接地、屏蔽和外壳文件。若ESB Networks或项目业主规定谐波限值或电能质量测量，应将测试报告逐条映射至该要求。
gap.zht: 差距：僅依據GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不能自動滿足愛爾蘭歐盟CE / IEC體系項目要求。出口商應取得針對特定型號或系列的IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列報告，確認諧波和傳導發射結果在230/400 V下是否仍有效，並提供適合潮濕海洋性愛爾蘭氣候的浪湧、接地、屏蔽和外殼文件。若ESB Networks或項目業主規定諧波限值或電能品質測量，應將測試報告逐條映射至該要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC Directive 2014/30/EU and CE marking are required for EU/Ireland market placement; IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 evidence is effectively required where NSAI, ESB Networks, or project-owner documentation calls for IEC EMC and power-quality evidence
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 EMC evidence is a China domestic voluntary or certification-programme baseline and is not an EU CE / Ireland IEC evidence substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Ireland PV inverter EMC as an EU CE / IEC evidence package, not a China GB/T certificate transfer. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports for the exact inverter model, review harmonic and EMC applicability at Ireland's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid voltage, and confirm any NSAI, CRU, ESB Networks, or project-owner EMC requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 爱尔兰光伏逆变器EMC应按欧盟CE / IEC证据包处理，而不是直接转移中国GB/T证书。请为准确逆变器型号准备IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列报告，审查谐波和EMC结果在爱尔兰230/400 V、50 Hz电网电压下的适用性，并在出货前确认任何NSAI、CRU、ESB Networks或项目业主EMC要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 愛爾蘭光伏逆變器EMC應按歐盟CE / IEC證據包處理，而不是直接轉移中國GB/T證書。請為準確逆變器型號準備IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列報告，審查諧波和EMC結果在愛爾蘭230/400 V、50 Hz電網電壓下的適用性，並在出貨前確認任何NSAI、CRU、ESB Networks或項目業主EMC要求。
